content: دوس عَلى الفَراَمِل لَحسَن تُخبَط اَلْعَرَبِيَّة الَّتي قُدَامَك

transcriptions.arabizi: doos Aala ilfaraamil lahsan tuchbat ilAarabiyya il-li 'udaem|ak

relationships: eng:step on the brakes otherwise you will hit the car in front of you
